nl_query: What is the total maximum marks per question paper?
failed_sql:
SELECT qp.id, qp.title, SUM(em.marks_awarded) AS total_max_marks
FROM question_paper qp
JOIN evaluation_marks em ON em.qp_id = qp.id
WHERE qp.is_active = TRUE
GROUP BY qp.id, qp.title
ORDER BY total_max_marks DESC
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): evaluation_marks.qp_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
